import "../styles/Team.css"; import { FaLinkedin, FaGithub } from "react-icons/fa"; const teamMembers = [ { name: "Anupam Sanfui", role: "Cyber Security Analyst", imgSrc: "/images/anupam.jpg", linkedin: "#", github: "#" }, { name: "Sayan Maity", role: "Advanced Data Analytics & ML Intern", imgSrc: "/images/sayan.jpg", linkedin: "#", github: "#" }, { name: "Rupankar Garai", role: "Freelancer | Intern at Edunet", imgSrc: "/images/rupankar.jpg", linkedin: "#", github: "#" }, { name: "Anisha Roy", role: "UI/UX Designer", imgSrc: "/images/anisha.jpg", linkedin: "#" }, { name: "Dev Sharma", role: "DevOps Engineer", imgSrc: "/images/dev.jpg", linkedin: "#" }, { name: "Sneha Gupta", role: "Full Stack Developer", imgSrc: "/images/sneha.jpg", linkedin: "#" }, { name: "Ravi Singh", role: "AI/ML Intern", imgSrc: "/images/ravi.jpg", linkedin: "#", github: "#" }, { name: "Megha Kapoor", role: "Marketing Head", imgSrc: "/images/megha.jpg", linkedin: "#" }, { name: "Ishaan Verma", role: "Product Manager", imgSrc: "/images/ishaan.jpg", linkedin: "#" }, ]; const you = { name: "Your Name", role: "Founder / CEO", imgSrc: "/images/you.jpg", linkedin: "#", github: "#" }; export default function Team() { return (

Our Team

Meet our talented team of professionals dedicated to delivering exceptional solutions.

{teamMembers.map((member, idx) => (

{member.name}

{member.role}

{member.linkedin && ( )} {member.github && ( )}
))}
); }
